message.content:
You are assessing one Coachella Valley dining establishment for an honest category-map artifact. The artifact's job is to map who's there, who wins what, and where the visibility gaps are.

Entity: Shields Date Garden (Cafe at Shields) (Indio)
Cuisine/type signal: California / Mexican-influenced breakfast & lunch; iconic date shake
Why it surfaced in discovery: Date farm founded 1924 by Floyd and Bess Shields, current Hwy 111 building in use since 1953; Cafe at Shields opened 2010; Coachella Valley Independent's readers' perennial best date shake; anchor of Indio identity and tourism.
Discovery sources: https://www.palmspringslife.com/history/discover-the-100-year-history-of-shields-date-garden-in-indio/ | https://cvindependent.com/2023/11/a-century-of-dates-shields-date-garden-our-readers-perennial-best-date-shake-choice-tells-the-story-of-how-the-fruit-became-a-coachella-valley-staple/ | https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shields_Date_Gardens

Verify the entity exists, then assess on four dimensions. Use WebSearch (ToolSearch query "WebSearch") and WebFetch (ToolSearch query "WebFetch") to investigate. Read the entity's own website. Read 2-3 review-platform pages. Run regional queries to test visibility.

REPUTATION:
- review_volume — approximate Google/Yelp review count band (e.g., "3000+", "500-1000", "<100"). Mark [UNVERIFIED] if you can't find it.
- sentiment — current sentiment summary (positive / mostly positive / mixed / declining / negative). Recent reviews weighted over stale.
- recency_signal — what do reviews in the last 6-12 months say?
- longevity — years operating, ownership stability. Mark [UNVERIFIED] if unclear.
- credentials — earned third-party recognition (James Beard nominee/winner, Michelin, Food Network, Yelp Top 100, OpenTable Top, Desert Sun / Palm Springs Life awards, local press features). Empty array if none. Do NOT invent credentials.

AGENT_VISIBILITY:
- appears_in_queries — which regional queries actually surface this entity? Test specific queries: "best restaurants Coachella Valley", "fine dining Palm Desert", "[entity's cuisine] near Palm Springs", "date night Rancho Mirage", "best breakfast [city]".
- description_accuracy — when it surfaces, is the description correct?
- site_structured_data — fetch the entity's own website. Does it carry schema.org markup, clean hours, menu structure, location signals an agent can read?

VISIBILITY GAP — score 0-10. 0 = reputation and visibility aligned. 10 = high reputation, low/wrong visibility.

RELATIONSHIPS:
- competitors — 2-4 direct competitors in same city or cuisine bracket
- corridor_role — anchor / supporting / outlier. Major corridors: El Paseo (Palm Desert), Old Town La Quinta, downtown Palm Springs, The River (Rancho Mirage), festival-adjacent Indio, north Palm Desert development zone, uptown design district Palm Springs.
- query_wins — which queries it actually dominates

CONVERTIBILITY (the layer above the map):
- tier — "anchor-reference" (chain/franchise/resort-owned, no reachable local DM), "convertible" (independently owned, reachable, evidence of marketing spend), or "unclear"
- ownership_signal — independent / chain / franchise / resort-owned / hotel-restaurant / unclear
- marketing_spend_signal — what evidence of marketing budget? real site / paid listings / agency footprint / active social
- reasoning — one paragraph

sources_consulted: list URLs you actually consulted.
flags: anything you couldn't verify — list the unverified claim with [UNVERIFIED] tag.

Stay disciplined: do NOT invent awards, credentials, history, or specific stats. If you can't verify, flag it. The downstream verification layer will catch hallucinations.

- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- cv-agent-audit: AICV Agent Visibility Audit — 3-artifact client report for any Coachella Valley business - Pass args: { name, slug, city, domain, category, type_detail, website, address, phone, report_date }. Produces owner report, developer brief, and AICV node YAML seed.
- anthropic-skills:consolidate-memory: Reflective pass over your memory files — merge duplicates, fix stale facts, prune the index.
- anthropic-skills:docx: Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files). Triggers include: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with formatting like tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterheads. Also use when extracting or reorganizing content from .docx files, inserting or replacing images in documents, performing find-and-replace in Word files, working with tracked changes or comments, or converting content into a polished Word document. If the user asks for a 'report', 'memo', 'letter', 'template', or similar deliverable as a Word or .docx file, use this skill. Do NOT use for PDFs, spreadsheets, Google Docs, or general coding tasks unrelated to document generation.
- anthropic-skills:pdf: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable. If the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one, use this skill.
- anthropic-skills:pptx: Use this skill any time a .pptx file is involved in any way — as input, output, or both. This includes: creating slide decks, pitch decks, or presentations; reading, parsing, or extracting text from any .pptx file (even if the extracted content will be used elsewhere, like in an email or summary); editing, modifying, or updating existing presentations; combining or splitting slide files; working with templates, layouts, speaker notes, or comments. Trigger whenever the user mentions "deck," "slides," "presentation," or references a .pptx filename, regardless of what they plan to do with the content afterward. If a .pptx file needs to be opened, created, or touched, use this skill.
- anthropic-skills:schedule: Create or update a scheduled task that runs automatically. Use when the user says things like "every day", "each morning", "remind me in an hour", "run this at noon", or wants to reschedule an existing task.
- anthropic-skills:setup-cowork: Guided Cowork setup — install role-matched plugins, connect your tools, try a skill.
- anthropic-skills:skill-creator: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
- anthropic-skills:sunshine-fm-human-rhythm: Design music, jingles, and spoken word for SunshineFM using the Human Rhythm Engine. Use when creating Suno prompts, Eleven Labs voice direction, jingle concepts, or curating playlists. Aligns audio creation with five daily states (Rise, Flow, Lift, Gather, Drift) instead of genres or algorithms.
- anthropic-skills:xlsx: Use this skill any time a spreadsheet file is the primary input or output. This means any task where the user wants to: open, read, edit, or fix an existing .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv file (e.g., adding columns, computing formulas, formatting, charting, cleaning messy data); create a new spreadsheet from scratch or from other data sources; or convert between tabular file formats. Trigger especially when the user references a spreadsheet file by name or path — even casually (like "the xlsx in my downloads") — and wants something done to it or produced from it. Also trigger for cleaning or restructuring messy tabular data files (malformed rows, misplaced headers, junk data) into proper spreadsheets. The deliverable must be a spreadsheet file. Do NOT trigger when the primary deliverable is a Word document, HTML report, standalone Python script, database pipeline, or Google Sheets API integration, even if tabular data is involved.
- cowork-plugin-management:cowork-plugin-customizer: Customize a Claude Code plugin for a specific organization's tools and workflows. Use when: customize plugin, set up plugin, configure plugin, tailor plugin, adjust plugin settings, customize plugin connectors, customize plugin skill, tweak plugin, modify plugin configuration.
- cowork-plugin-management:create-cowork-plugin: Guide users through creating a new plugin from scratch in a cowork session. Use when users want to create a plugin, build a plugin, make a new plugin, develop a plugin, scaffold a plugin, start a plugin from scratch, or design a plugin. This skill requires Cowork mode with access to the outputs directory for delivering the final .plugin file.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

Links: [{"title":"SHIELDS DATE GARDEN - Updated May 2026 - 1689 Photos & 1018 Reviews - 80225 US Hwy 111, Indio, California - Fruits & Veggies - Phone Number - Offerings - Yelp","url":"https://www.yelp.com/biz/shields-date-garden-indio-2"},{"title":"THE CAFE AT SHIELDS DATE GARDEN - Updated April 2026 - 568 Photos & 412 Reviews - 80-225 US Hwy 111, Indio, California - Breakfast & Brunch - Restaurant Reviews - Phone Number - Menu - Yelp","url":"https://www.yelp.com/biz/the-cafe-at-shields-date-garden-indio-2"},{"title":"THE CAFE AT SHIELDS, Indio - Menu, Prices & Restaurant Reviews - Tripadvisor","url":"https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g32524-d524190-Reviews-The_Cafe_at_Shields-Indio_Greater_Palm_Springs_California.html"},{"title":"Shields Date Garden - All You SHOULD Know Before Going 2026 (with Reviews)","url":"https://www.tripadvisor.com/Attraction_Review-g32524-d104113-Reviews-Shields_Date_Garden-Indio_Greater_Palm_Springs_California.html"},{"title":"The Cafe at Shields Date Garden Menu in Indio, CA | Order Delivery & Reviews","url":"https://www.menupix.com/riverside/restaurants/505359/The-Cafe-at-Shields-Date-Garden-Indio-CA"},{"title":"Cafe at Shields Date Garden for an Outdoor Lunch - Fun Orange County Parks","url":"https://funorangecountyparks.com/cafe-at-shields-date-garden-indio-outdoor-lunch.html"},{"title":"Shields Date Garden, Indio - Menu, Reviews (349), Photos (73) - Restaurantji","url":"https://www.restaurantji.com/ca/indio/shields-date-garden-/"},{"title":"Cafe at Shield's Date Garden - Indio, California - Mama Likes To Cook","url":"https://mamalikestocook.com/shields-date-garden-cafe-indio-california/"},{"title":"Shields Date Gardens in Indio - California Through My Lens","url":"https://californiathroughmylens.com/shields-date-gardens-indio/"},{"title":"Shields Date Garden, Indio - Restaurant menu, prices and reviews","url":"https://restaurantguru.com/Shields-Date-Garden-Indio-3"}]

I've found comprehensive review information for Shields Date Garden's Cafe in Indio from multiple sources including Yelp and Google reviews (through aggregator sites). Here's what I found:

## Review Ratings (2026)

The Yelp page was updated in May 2026 with 1689 Photos and 1018 Reviews, while The Cafe at Shields Date Garden page on Yelp was updated in April 2026 with 568 Photos and 412 Reviews.

On Tripadvisor, The Cafe at Shields is rated 4.4 of 5 and ranked #3 of 133 restaurants in Indio. On Restaurant Guru, Shields Date Garden is rated 4.3 out of 5 with 1716 reviews by visitors.

## Positive Reviews

Reviewers consistently praise the date shakes as "absolutely incredible—so thick and flavorful", and the service is described as outstanding and the food as memorable. The cafe specializes in California cuisine with Signature Date Items such as stuffed dates, date burger, date pancakes, and Shields Signature Salad, plus Mexican Food.

The garden walk is praised as "a beautiful experience, featuring a variety of plants and a unique theme that tells the story of Christ's life through sculptures".

## Mixed/Negative Reviews

Not all experiences were perfect. Some reviews mention service was slow and it took a couple of tries to get orders correct, and while restaurant service was disappointing during one visit, the friendly staff at the gift shop and variety of date-related products made the overall experience enjoyable.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

# Shields Date Garden - Business Information

## Business Description
Shields Date Garden is a date farm and specialty food retailer established December 24, 1924. They describe themselves as offering "Farm Fresh Dates & More!" The company celebrates its centennial milestone, noting: "Our strength as a company comes from the many people and customers God has blessed us with since December 24th 1924."

## Location & Contact
- Primary location appears to be in the Greater Palm Springs area (referenced in Palm Springs Life Magazine recognition)
- Website: shieldsdategarden.com
- Online ordering available via shopping cart

## Product Categories
- Multiple date varieties (Medjool, Deglet Noor, Barhi, Halawi, Honey, Khadrawi, Zahidi, Thoory, Abbada, Blonde & Brunette)
- Date-based specialty products (Date Crystals®, Date Sugar®, Date Syrup®)
- Fresh citrus
- Sauces, dressings, pickled vegetables, mustard
- Candy and chocolate
- Snacks, nuts, dried fruit
- Gift boxes and books/memorabilia

## Facilities & Services
- On-site café (cafe.shieldsdategarden.com)
- Guided tour of grounds ("The Walk")
- Theater venue
- Recipe collection and blog

## Recognition
Awarded recognition by Palm Springs Life magazine in their "Best of the Best" readers' choice category.

**Note:** No specific hours, schema.org markup details, or ownership names were provided in the source content.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Shields Date Garden and its award recognition:

For 10 years, the Independent has done its Best of Coachella Valley readers' poll—and in every one of those polls, Shields Date Garden has won the Best Date Shake category. This award comes from the Coachella Valley Independent, the publication referenced in your search query.

Additionally, in April 2022, the city of Indio, the county of Riverside and the state of California recognized Shields' creation as the official county date shake.

Shields Date Garden was founded in 1924 by Floyd and Bess Shields, and since 1924, the shop off Highway 111, featuring a giant knight statue, has welcomed visitors to enjoy dates—and learn about the date industry of the Coachella Valley.

Based on the search results, here are some of the best breakfast restaurants in Indio, California:

## Top Breakfast Spots

**Sloan's Restaurant** - A laid-back restaurant offering casual American cuisine, it's a local favorite for its generously plated breakfast options, including Sloans Classic French Toast, German Pancakes, and Date Nut Pancakes. The portions are known to be laughably large.

**Keedy's Indio** - Conveniently located in the heart of Indio, Keedy's is a favorite for locals, snowbirds, and festival-goers alike, and is open for breakfast, brunch, or lunch seven days a week.

**TKB Bakery & Deli** - This sandwich spot ranks at the top of the Yelp rankings nationwide every year and one of the reasons is their Breakfast of Champions Sandwich that comes with scrambled eggs, cheddar cheese, bacon, mayonnaise, lettuce, tomato and avocado on a fresh French roll.

**Serrano's Juice Bar and Grill** - This place is becoming better known for their breakfasts than their juices, with options for a breakfast burrito, omelettes, Eggs Benedict, chicken fried steak, and more.

**The Broken Yolk** - A large restaurant with inside and outside seating.

**Casa de Silvia** - You will find some delicious chilaquiles, huevos rancheros, huevos divorciados, and more at this authentic Mexican restaurant in Indio.

These restaurants offer a variety of options from traditional American breakfast fare to authentic Mexican breakfast specialties.

Based on the web search results, here's what I found about Shields Date Garden's history, ownership, and connection to 1924 and Indio:

## Founding and Ownership

The company was founded in 1924 by Floyd and Bess (Lugton) Shields. More specifically, Floyd and Bess Shields took a chance on a new adventure, opening a date ranch in the Coachella Valley on Christmas Day 1924. Floyd traded a Long Beach apartment lease and some furniture for a run-down palm grove in Indio.

## Family Involvement

Floyd Shields was one of the pioneering date farmers in the still-young date industry of the Coachella Valley. Floyd and Bess Shields and their descendants ran the date garden until 2005, when the operation was sold to Jewel Date Company.

## Location

Shields Date Garden is a historic date palm orchard and tourist attraction in Indio, California, United States.

The Shields family's legacy in date farming helped establish the Coachella Valley as a major date-growing region, and their innovations in date varieties and marketing techniques made Shields Date Garden an iconic California destination.

Links: [{"title":"It's a Date: 7 Great Date Shakes in Greater Palm Springs","url":"https://www.visitgreaterpalmsprings.com/blog/post/date-shakes-in-greater-palm-springs/"},{"title":"The Date Shake: The Coachella Valley’s Coolest Concoction | Palm Springs Life","url":"https://www.palmspringslife.com/restaurants/the-date-shake-the-coachella-valleys-coolest-concoction/"},{"title":"The 7 Best Places to Get a Date Shake - Sidetrack Adventures","url":"https://sidetrackadventures.com/7-best-places-to-get-a-date-shake/"},{"title":"TOP 10 BEST Date Shake in Palm Springs, CA - Updated 2026 - Yelp","url":"https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Date+Shake&find_loc=Palm+Springs%2C+CA"}]

Based on the search results, here are some of the best places to get a date shake in the Coachella Valley and Palm Springs area:

## Notable Date Shake Destinations:

**Shields Date Garden** - Located at 80225 CA-111 in Indio, Shields offers a 17-acre date grove and botanical garden along with date shakes made using date crystals, a method that originated there.

**Lappert's** - Located in Palm Desert, Lappert's offers a rich and creamy date shake made using ultra-premium date ice cream blended with house-made date paste, prepared daily from fresh Coachella Valley dates.

**Windmill Market** - Located in North Palm Springs, Windmill Market is a very popular stop where the date shakes and malts are amazing, and there is a nice garden to sit in while you enjoy your treats. The locale is described as having the "best date shake in the desert."

**Monster Shakes** - With locations in Cathedral City and Palm Springs, Monster Shakes is the go-to spot for over-the-top milkshakes, and they offer a Vegan Date Shake made with Coconut Bliss, coconut milk, and fresh dates.

**Hadley Fruit Orchards** - Originally opened in Banning in 1931, the current location is in Cabazon, near the giant dinosaurs.

The date shake is a Southern California original, said to have been invented in the Coachella Valley in the 1920s, and has frequently been referred to as the unofficial drink of the Coachella Valley.

I found comprehensive information about things to do in Indio and the Coachella Valley! Here are the top attractions and landmarks:

## Iconic Landmarks & Attractions in Indio

**Music Festivals & Entertainment:**
The Coachella Music and Arts festival has been luring music lovers to Indio, CA since 1999, and the Empire Polo Club is known worldwide as the home of the Coachella Music and Arts Festival.

**Historic Museums & Cultural Sites:**
- The Coachella Valley History Museum in Indio offers an in-depth look at the region's past, with exhibits covering everything from the indigenous Cahuilla people to the agricultural development that shaped the valley.
- The 6-acre museum campus preserves the Coachella Valley's layered history through original buildings including the 1909 Indio Schoolhouse, a blacksmith's shop, the one-of-a-kind Date Museum, and the Smiley-Tyler adobe home.

**Agricultural Heritage:**
- Indio is known as the "Date Capital of the World," with ties to this sweet fruit deeply rooted in its agricultural heritage.
- Shields Date Garden has been in business since 1924, where you can wander the date groves and garden pathways, and check out the educational film The Romance & Sex Life of the Date.

**Outdoor Activities:**
- The Indio Hills Badlands Trail offers a rugged glimpse of the region's geologic drama, with a 5-mile loop that winds through slot canyons, sandy washes, and ridgelines opening to sweeping views of the Coachella Valley.
- The Lights at Indio Golf Course is the valley's only facility with a fully lit 18-hole layout, allowing play well into the evening.

## Broader Coachella Valley Attractions

Joshua Tree National Park is one of the most popular attractions in the Coachella Valley, with hiking trails that wind through the rocky landscape, providing breathtaking views of the surrounding desert.

The Palm Springs Aerial Tramway is one of Palm Springs' most famous attractions, taking passengers from the Valley floor to the top of Mount San Jacinto, offering stunning views of the desert landscape.

input.name: Shields Date Garden (Cafe at Shields)
input.cuisine_or_type: California cuisine breakfast & lunch with date-forward signature items and Mexican-influenced plates; on-site cafe at a 17-acre date grove and gift shop

reputation.review_volume: Yelp main listing ~1,000+ reviews; Cafe at Shields Yelp ~400+ reviews; Tripadvisor attraction listing several hundred; Restaurant Guru aggregates ~1,700+
reputation.recency_signal: Recent reviews (2025-2026) consistently praise the date shake as exceptional and the grounds/garden walk as a unique experience; service at the cafe described as slower or inconsistent on busy days, but most visits rated positively. Yelp and Tripadvisor pages updated April-May 2026.
reputation.longevity: Date garden operating since 1924 (Floyd and Bess Shields); current Highway 111 site since 1953; sold to Jewel Date Company in 2005; Cafe at Shields opened 2010 — 100+ years for the garden, ~15 years for the cafe
credentials: Coachella Valley Independent Best of Coachella Valley readers' poll - Best Date Shake (perennial winner, 10+ consecutive years per CV Independent 2023 feature)
Palm Springs Life 'Best of the Best' readers' choice recognition (self-reported on site)
Tripadvisor ranked #3 of 133 restaurants in Indio (Cafe at Shields)
Recognized by City of Indio, County of Riverside, and State of California (April 2022) as the official county date shake creator (per CV Independent)
Featured by Palm Springs Life, Atlas Obscura, Roadfood, and Coachella Valley Weekly

agent_visibility.appears_in_queries: Reliably surfaces for: 'best date shake Coachella Valley', 'things to do Indio', 'Indio attractions', 'date farm Coachella Valley', 'historic Indio landmarks'. Inconsistently surfaces for: 'best breakfast Indio' (Sloan's, Keedy's, TKB, Serrano's, Casa de Silvia dominate that bracket; Shields not in top results), 'California cuisine Coachella Valley', 'Mexican breakfast Indio'. Does NOT surface for general 'best restaurants Coachella Valley' or fine-dining queries — its identity is locked to the date-shake/attraction frame, not the restaurant frame.
agent_visibility.description_accuracy: When it surfaces, descriptions are generally accurate but frame Shields as an attraction/farm/gift shop with a shake stand. The Cafe at Shields as a full sit-down California/Mexican breakfast and lunch venue is undersold in agent-readable descriptions; many summaries omit the cafe entirely.
agent_visibility.site_structured_data: Main shieldsdategarden.com is an e-commerce / retail site (Shopify-style cart) with product catalog structure but no clear restaurant schema. cafe.shieldsdategarden.com lists hours (8am-2pm daily) in plain text, links a 2025-2026 menu PDF (not machine-readable as Menu schema), and has NO visible schema.org JSON-LD or microdata for Restaurant, LocalBusiness, Menu, or OpeningHoursSpecification. Address/phone are present but unstructured. This is a meaningful gap given the entity's recognition level.

competitors: Sloan's Restaurant (Indio) - direct breakfast competitor with date-nut pancakes
Windmill Market (North Palm Springs) - direct date-shake competitor
Hadley Fruit Orchards (Cabazon) - regional date-shake and roadside-attraction competitor
relationships.corridor_role: anchor — Shields is a defining anchor of Indio's agricultural-tourism identity along Highway 111 and one of the most-cited 'things to do in Indio' landmarks; it is not part of a dining corridor like El Paseo, but anchors the date-heritage corridor

convertibility.ownership_signal: independent (owned by Jewel Date Company since 2005, a regional date-industry operator, not a national chain or hospitality group)
convertibility.marketing_spend_signal: Real, maintained primary website with e-commerce, separate cafe subdomain, active social presence, branded packaging, on-site theater and tour infrastructure, sustained press coverage. Marketing footprint is substantial but skews toward CPG/retail (selling dates direct-to-consumer nationwide) rather than restaurant marketing. No agency footprint visible.
convertibility.reasoning: Shields is independently owned by Jewel Date Company and clearly invests in marketing — the e-commerce site, dual-domain architecture, on-site theater, branded merchandise, and consistent press placement all signal real budget. However, the operation functions more as a heritage/agritourism brand and CPG retailer than as a restaurant business; the cafe is one program among several (retail, tours, events, online dates shipping). It is a recognizable anchor reference for the Coachella Valley dining map (you must place it to map Indio), but as a sales target it is a corporate-owned property where the decision-maker likely sits in date-industry operations rather than restaurant marketing. Tier: anchor-reference for category-map purposes.

flags: Exact current Google review count not directly verified [UNVERIFIED] — Yelp counts (~1,000 main, ~400 cafe) confirmed via search snippets; Google count inferred from aggregator (~1,700 on Restaurant Guru) but not directly read from a Google Maps page
Palm Springs Life 'Best of the Best' recognition is self-reported on shieldsdategarden.com; specific year/category not independently verified [UNVERIFIED]

Claim that CV Independent has named Shields Best Date Shake every year for 10 consecutive years is taken from the CV Independent 2023 article itself; subsequent years (2024-2026) not independently verified [UNVERIFIED]
Current management/decision-maker contact at Jewel Date Company not verified [UNVERIFIED]
Cafe at Shields opening date of 2010 from discovery brief — not independently re-verified in this pass [UNVERIFIED]
